description_long: This is a modern urban fence composed of two robust brick pillars supporting a central section made of horizontal wooden slats. The brick pillars are capped with red, pyramid-shaped tops, adding a touch of architectural detail and weather protection. The wooden slats are arranged closely together, providing privacy and a warm, natural aesthetic. The fence is solid and opaque, making it suitable for use as a boundary in residential or commercial settings. The materials and construction suggest durability and resistance to outdoor elements. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements beyond the contrasting materials and cap shapes.
description: A sturdy urban fence with brick pillars and horizontal wooden slats, topped with red pyramid caps. The design is solid, opaque, and modern.
description_view_0: Side view showing a single brick pillar with a red pyramid cap and a partial view of the wooden slats.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the fence, with two brick pillars and a central section of horizontal wooden slats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other brick pillar and cap.
description_view_3: Rear view of the fence, highlighting the horizontal wooden slats and both brick pillars with red caps.
